item.title: Hiring more SDRs — short (2026-04-17)
item.description:
"We're hiring 5 more SDRs." Heard twice this week.
Companies pulling ahead are doing the opposite: Block: -40% team, +54% profit guide. Klarna: 5,500 to 3,400 staff.
Stop backfilling. Let AI absorb the repetitive.
Smallest team that could run your sales today?
